column11:
One of the recent sales automation projects we delivered was for a company generating leads from multiple channels, including WhatsApp, website forms, and live chat.

**Challenge:**
The client was receiving leads through WATI (WhatsApp), WordPress Contact Forms, and Tawk.to live chat. Each channel was being managed separately, resulting in delayed responses, missed opportunities, duplicate follow-ups, inactive lead ownership, and no standardized process for lead distribution. Sales managers also lacked a single source of truth for tracking lead activity.

**Solution:**
We built a centralized AI-powered lead management system that automatically captures, qualifies, assigns, and tracks leads from all inbound channels. The system identifies lead intent, filters spam, routes leads to the right sales representative, and ensures every inquiry receives immediate attention.

**Workflow:**
• Lead enters through WhatsApp (WATI), Website Form (WordPress), or Live Chat (Tawk.to)
• AI analyzes the inquiry and identifies product/service interest
• Spam and irrelevant submissions are filtered automatically
• Lead details are enriched and categorized
• Lead is assigned using round-robin distribution logic
• Returning leads are routed back to the previous agent when appropriate
• Instant notifications are sent to the sales team
• All lead activity is stored in a centralized system for tracking and reporting

**Business Impact:**
✅ 100% lead capture across WhatsApp, website forms, and live chat
✅ Zero missed inquiries through automated routing and assignment
✅ 3x faster response times through instant lead qualification
✅ ~80% reduction in spam and bot-generated submissions reaching sales teams
✅ Fair workload distribution across agents
✅ Improved lead ownership and follow-up consistency
✅ Complete visibility of lead history and sales activity for management
✅ Higher conversion opportunities by engaging prospects immediately

**Demo Video:**
https://youtu.be/XwBNxFNzhdI

If you're looking to streamline lead handling, reduce response times, and ensure no opportunity slips through the cracks, I'd be happy to show how a similar solution can be adapted to your business.

column11:
One of the recent automation projects I delivered was for a company managing lead assignments between their internal platform (Supabase) and GoHighLevel CRM.

**Business Challenge:**
When leads were assigned internally, the updates were not automatically reflected in the CRM. This created data silos, duplicate records, inaccurate pipeline reporting, and required manual effort from the sales team to keep systems synchronised.

**Solution Implemented:**
I built an automated lead management workflow that keeps the CRM updated in real time whenever a lead is assigned. The process automatically creates or updates customer records, generates sales opportunities, tracks lead allocation metrics, and instantly notifies the sales team.

**Workflow:**
• Lead gets assigned in the internal platform
• Contact is automatically created/updated in CRM
• Sales opportunity is added to the pipeline
• Lead allocation metrics are updated automatically
• Assignment notification is sent to the responsible team member

**Business Impact:**
✅ 100% real-time synchronization between internal systems and CRM
✅ Eliminated duplicate contact creation
✅ Automated opportunity creation for every assigned lead
✅ Accurate pipeline and lead-count reporting without manual work
✅ Faster sales response through instant assignment notifications
✅ Reduced administrative effort and improved sales team productivity

If you're exploring ways to automate sales operations, CRM processes, or lead management workflows, I'd be happy to share more relevant examples.

column11:
Project: AI Video Cloning System — Automated Spokesperson Video Pipeline

This project was built for a team that wanted to create AI spokesperson-style videos at scale without manually handling every step of production.

Their main challenge was that each video required too many manual steps — downloading reference footage, generating voiceovers, uploading files to different AI tools, running lip-sync, waiting for output, and then tracking the final video link. Because of this, creating videos in batches was slow, inconsistent, and difficult to scale.

We built an automated AI video production workflow where the team could simply manage video requests from Google Sheets, and the system would handle the full production flow automatically.

Workflow:
• Team adds the script and reference video details in Google Sheets
• System downloads the reference video from Google Drive
• Script is converted into realistic voice using ElevenLabs
• Video and voiceover are sent into the AI lip-sync workflow
• AI generates the final spokesperson-style video
• System keeps checking until the video is ready
• Final output video link is saved back into Google Sheets for the team

Business Impact:

✅ End-to-end AI video produced in under 15 minutes instead of hours manually
✅ Batch production enabled through a Google Sheets queue, allowing the team to scale to 10s of videos per day
✅ ElevenLabs voice generation improved voice quality compared to manual/basic voiceover methods
✅ Zero manual file handling — uploads, downloads, and processing were fully automated
✅ Final output URLs were auto-logged in Sheets for instant team access

The key value here was scalability. Instead of manually creating one video at a time, the client got a repeatable AI content production system that could handle bulk video creation with minimal human involvement.

Demo/video link:
https://youtu.be/qT3NdoiYIYk

One of the recent automation projects we delivered was for a P2P lending company that needed to speed up borrower qualification and investor matching.

**Business Challenge:**
The client was manually reviewing borrower applications, qualifying prospects, finding suitable investors, and conducting outreach calls. This process created operational bottlenecks, delayed investor engagement by days, and reduced overall conversion rates.

**Solution Delivered:**
We built an AI-driven qualification and investor-matching workflow that automatically evaluates borrowers, identifies the most relevant investors, and initiates investor outreach within minutes of application submission.

• AI qualifies the borrower based on lending criteria

column11:
One of the recent solutions we built was an AI-powered WhatsApp Receptionist for a restaurant business.

**Challenge:**
The restaurant was handling orders manually through calls and WhatsApp messages. Staff had to answer repetitive menu questions, apply offers manually, collect customer details, and record orders, which often led to delays, missed upsell opportunities, and operational inefficiencies.

**Solution:**
We implemented an AI receptionist that operates directly on the restaurant's existing WhatsApp number. Customers can browse the menu, ask questions, place orders, and receive pricing with active promotions automatically applied. Once an order is confirmed, it is instantly recorded and shared with the restaurant owner.

**Workflow:**
• Customer sends a message on WhatsApp
• AI guides them through the menu and available offers
• AI collects customer and delivery details
• Order is automatically verified and confirmed
• Order details are logged into the restaurant dashboard
• Owner receives an instant notification for fulfillment

**Business Impact:**
✅ Customers order through a familiar channel with zero app downloads or registrations
✅ Consistent promotion handling with no missed upsell opportunities
✅ Multiple customer conversations managed simultaneously without staff intervention
✅ 100% order capture with structured customer and order data
✅ Complete conversation history available for tracking and customer service
✅ Reduced manual workload, allowing staff to focus on food preparation and delivery
✅ Scalable foundation for future online payments, loyalty programs, and customer follow-ups
